---
title: "RentSignal Blog"
subtitle: "Data-driven insights on the German rental market"
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: posts/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, author, categories, description, image]
page-layout: full
---

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
